title: DSNSZone
description: Domain Semantic Name Service zone declaration. Owns a DNS zone and its records within the Seam infrastructure domain. Records are authored by controllers that own the named resources; humans do not write DSNS records directly.

origin.description: DNS zone apex (origin) for this DSNS zone (e.g., guardian.seam.ontai.dev). Must be a fully-qualified domain name.

ttl.description: Default TTL in seconds for records in this zone.

records.description: List of DNS records within this zone. Authored by the controllers that own the referenced resources.

conditions.description: Standard Kubernetes condition array for this resource.

DSNSRecord.description: A single DNS record within a DSNSZone.

name.description: Record name relative to the zone origin (e.g., guardian, _spiffe.guardian).

value.description: Record value. Format depends on record type: A records use IPv4 addresses, TXT records use quoted strings, NS records use nameserver FQDNs.

ttl.description: TTL in seconds for this record. Overrides the zone default when set.

ownerKind.description: Kind of the Kubernetes resource that owns this record (e.g., SeamMembership, RBACProfile).

ownerName.description: Name of the Kubernetes resource that owns this record.

ownerNamespace.description: Namespace of the Kubernetes resource that owns this record.
